subject: PhD Topology
instructions: Work the following problems and show all work. Support all statements to the best of your ability. Answer problems 6–15 with complete definitions or statements or short proofs.

problems.text: Show that there is no retraction of the Möbius band onto its boundary.
Does there exist a covering space of the figure eight with nontrivial abelian fundamental group?
Show that the 2-dimensional sphere with three points deleted cannot be a topological group.
Let \(M\) be a 4-dimensional closed simply connected manifold. Show that every continuous map \(f:M\to M\) which is homotopic to the identity has a fixed point.
State the Lefschetz Fixed Point Theorem.
Show that no covering of the 2-torus has the homotopy type of a figure eight.

Let \(S_r(x,y)\) denote a circle of radius \(r\) centered at \((x,y)\in\mathbb{R}^2\). Let \(\Sigma R\) be the suspension over Hawaiian ring \(R=\bigcup_{n=1}^{\infty}S_{\frac{1}{n}}\!\left(\frac{1}{n},0\right)\). Is \(\Sigma R\)
State the Universal Coefficient formula for homology.
Let \(X\) be a complete metric space such that no point is isolated. Can \(X\) be countable?
